entries.title: Phishing Initial Access Response
entries.summary: Contain user-targeted phishing campaigns and prevent credential replay against mission systems.
recommended_actions: Block identified sender infrastructure at secure email gateways.
Force credential reset for targeted operators and privileged users.
Deploy endpoint hunting query for suspicious child-process execution from mail clients.

entries.title: Command and Scripting Interpreter Containment
entries.summary: Detect and suppress malicious script execution used for persistence and command-and-control staging.
recommended_actions: Apply emergency application control rules for high-risk interpreters.
Quarantine endpoints exhibiting encoded PowerShell or shell obfuscation behavior.
Correlate script block logs with known adversary tooling signatures.
